supported_devices: Any LED fixture with 0-10V or 0-5V analog dimming input; up to 200 daisy-chained fixtures per module
port_types: 1x 0-10V / 0-5V analog dimmer output, 24V DC power input
ai_notes: Platform-wide ML automation engine for light scheduling and intensity optimization; AI Agronomist uses image recognition and NLP for plant health diagnosis (photo and voice input); weekly AI Climate Summary reports. AI features require cloud connectivity. Free tier available for AI Agronomist per manufacturer.
compatible_lights: any LED fixture with 0-10V or 0-5V analog dimming input (standard dimmable LED driver protocol)
recommended_use_note: Commercial grow room LED light intensity and schedule automation using standard 0-10V / 0-5V dimming protocol. Compatible with any dimmable LED driver. Part of scalable GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem.
uvp_notes: Indicative price from AgriExpo marketplace, excl. tax. Official shop requires quote request. May not reflect current pricing.
notes: Part of GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem. Made in Israel. Outputs an analog 0-10V or 0-5V control signal to dimmable LED drivers — not a power supply. Up to 200 fixtures can be daisy-chained per module; up to 16,000 across networked modules. System maintains local automation when internet unavailable; full remote access requires internet. Not sold on Amazon.de.
